final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing abstract expressionist artwork suitable for modern art gallery display.

Style/medium: needs an abstract expressionist aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must be non-representational, conveying emotion and energy through form and color alone
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs bold color collision direction — exact color choices and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs flowing, gestural brushwork texture — exact paint application is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid: must avoid any recognizable or concrete imagery
